# Terminal conformance reference

<!-- Generated by `qdb generate reference` from the sequence database and `db/results/*.toml`. Do not edit by hand. -->

The generated "caniuse + MDN for terminals" reference: what each control sequence is,
where it is specified, and what real terminals actually did when probed. Support claims
are live-capture evidence, never hand-assertion (design 05).

- [Support matrix](matrix.md) — per-sequence verdicts across every captured target.
- [Conformance summary](summary.md) — per-family answered/total counts.
